en: This is a bottle. It looks like poison.
It doesn't have ghost pepper.
There's something going on with this one, though.
All right. All right. All right. Let's...
You can only... It's hard to explain. There's a decent-sized one here, isn't there? There you go. Yeah. Okay. I'll wait for it.
ko: 설명하기 어려운데... 여기 꽤 큰 게 있네요, 그렇죠? 자, 좋아요. 기다릴게요.

en: Something serious right there. Why are you eating so much of it?
ko: 뭔가 심각한 상황이에요. 왜 그렇게 많이 먹고 있어요?

en: That's what the people came to see. Oh, God. Oh, God. Oh, my God. Yeah. This is a wild one.
ko: 사람들이 그걸 보러 왔어요. 오, 신이시여. 오, 신이시여. 오, 세상에. 이건 정말 대단해요.

en: This is fucking hot, yo.
I'm telling you.
Oh, bro.
It's all hot sauce.
That's a crazy one. That's a crazy one.
ko: 이건 미친 거예요. 진짜 미친 거예요.

en: What? Stop.
Hold on, man, because I'm dealing with some moral discomfort. Ooh.
ko: 잠깐만, 도덕적 불편함을 느끼고 있어요. 우우.

en: Take another little sip of milk on that one.
ko: 그거에 우유 한 모금 더 마셔봐요.

en: It's like some wine you got swishing around.
ko: 마치 와인을 입안에서 돌리는 것 같아요.

en: Yeah, yeah, yeah. I love ranch. Could use it right now. Don't know why you didn't have it.
ko: 네, 네, 네. 난 랜치를 좋아해요. 지금 필요해요. 왜 없는지 모르겠어요.

en: Can I drink ranch dressing?
There you go. Hitting the ranch. A first time.
Well, that's a bad idea. What is this, the end?
ko: 음, 그건 나쁜 생각이에요. 이게 끝인가요?
